title: Avoid excessive class dependencies (Monster Class)
description: Classes that depend on too many other classes are harder to maintain, understand, and test. Excessive dependencies often indicate poor design and can lead to tightly coupled code that is difficult to refactor or extend. Reducing dependencies improves modularity and code quality.
recommendation: Refactor classes to reduce the number of dependencies, splitting responsibilities and promoting better modular design.

checks.message: Refactor classes to reduce the number of dependencies, splitting responsibilities and promoting better modular design.
